case_title: MICHAEL ROBERT HARRINGTON VS. UNITED WORLDWIDE CAR SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, MICHAEL ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED WORLDWIDE CAR SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
